name: nutria
description: NutrIA - Nutrition Tracking App with AI Chatbot

scripts.start:dev: npm run start:dev:backend & npm run start:dev:frontend
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/build frontend/dist
scripts.backend:prepare: npm run backend:migrate && npm run backend:seed
scripts.start:backend: npm run backend:prepare && npm -w backend run start

author: Fernando Henriques
